column1: # Book fixtures for the App Store demo server. Tab-separated. All
# entries are unambiguously public-domain in the US and ship from
# cover art baked in and consistent metadata.
#   se_id          Standard Ebooks book id (used in the EPUB URL —
#   ol_work_id     OpenLibrary work id (e.g. OL66554W). Used by
#                  link-fixtures.sh to pin the OL match. Leave blank
#                  to let the BookScannerAgent's auto-match try, but
#                  for demo determinism it's best to fill these in.
# Lines beginning with '#' or blank are ignored.
#   - Conan Doyle multi-volume Sherlock Holmes series
